_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for local development credentials. Read at runtime by backend/app/core/test_credentials.py (Python) and frontend/tests/e2e/test-credentials.ts (TypeScript). NOT a secret: local development + testing only, never used in production. To change the dev password, edit ONLY this file, then run backend/reset_local_password.py to re-hash existing local DB users. The drift guard (scripts/check_dev_credentials_drift.py) fails CI if any literal credential is hardcoded elsewhere.
